name: netbird
title: NetBird
description: Control your NetBird mesh network right from Raycast.
author: mi7chal

commands.name: connect
commands.title: Connect
commands.subtitle: NetBird
commands.description: Connects to NetBird and starts the background daemon.

commands.name: peers
commands.title: Show Peers
commands.subtitle: NetBird
commands.description: View all peers in your NetBird network with detailed statuses.

commands.name: networks
commands.title: Show Networks
commands.subtitle: NetBird
commands.description: View and manage network routes selection.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Show Status
commands.subtitle: NetBird
commands.description: Shows Netbird's connection status and information.

commands.name: admin
commands.title: Open Admin Panel
commands.subtitle: NetBird
commands.description: Open the NetBird admin panel in your default web browser.

preferences.name: adminUrl
preferences.title: Admin Panel URL
preferences.description: Overwrite the default admin panel URL

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
